questions.question: Define natural vegetation.
questions.answer: Natural vegetation refers to plants that grow naturally without human aid and remain undisturbed for a long time.

questions.question: Distinguish between flora and fauna.
questions.answer: Flora refers to plant life of a region while fauna refers to animal life of a region.

questions.question: What are endemic species?
questions.answer: Endemic species are plants and animals that are found only in a particular region.

questions.question: What are exotic plants?
questions.answer: Exotic plants are plant species that have been introduced from outside India.

questions.question: Why do evergreen forests appear green throughout the year?
questions.answer: Evergreen forests appear green throughout the year because trees do not shed their leaves at the same time.

questions.question: Why are tropical deciduous forests called monsoon forests?
questions.answer: They are called monsoon forests because their growth depends mainly on monsoon rainfall.

questions.question: Name any two trees found in tropical evergreen forests.
questions.answer: Ebony and mahogany.

questions.question: Name two trees found in tropical deciduous forests.
questions.answer: Teak and sal.

questions.question: Why do thorn forests develop in certain regions?
questions.answer: Thorn forests develop in regions with low rainfall and dry climate.

questions.question: What type of vegetation is found in mountainous regions?
questions.answer: Montane forests are found in mountainous regions.

questions.question: What are mangrove forests?
questions.answer: Mangrove forests are tidal forests found in coastal areas influenced by tides.

questions.question: Name two animals found in tropical deciduous forests.
questions.answer: Lion and tiger.

questions.question: Name two animals found in montane forests.
questions.answer: Yak and snow leopard.

questions.question: Why are mangrove forests important?
questions.answer: Mangrove forests protect coastal areas and support biodiversity.

questions.question: What is biodiversity?
questions.answer: Biodiversity refers to the variety of plants and animals in a region.

questions.question: Why is biodiversity important?
questions.answer: Biodiversity maintains ecological balance and supports life.

questions.question: Name one medicinal plant used to treat blood pressure.
questions.answer: Sarpagandha.

questions.question: Which plant is known for its antibacterial properties?
questions.answer: Neem.

questions.question: When was the Wildlife Protection Act implemented in India?
What is a biosphere reserve?
questions.answer: A biosphere reserve is a protected area for conserving plants and animals.

questions.question: Name one biosphere reserve in India.
questions.answer: Nilgiri Biosphere Reserve.

questions.question: Name one national park in India.
questions.answer: Jim Corbett National Park.

questions.question: Name one wildlife sanctuary in India.
questions.answer: Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary.

questions.question: Give one reason for the loss of biodiversity.
questions.answer: Deforestation.

questions.question: Name one migratory bird visiting India.
questions.answer: Siberian crane.
